sections.paragraph:
(1) a piece, a part, pl. גְּזָרִים parts of victims, Gen 15:17 the parts of the divided sea, Psa 136:13.

(2) Gezer [Gazer], (prob. “place cut off,” “precipice”), pr.n. of a city, formerly a royal city of the Canaanites ( Jos 10:33 12:12 ); situated in the western border of the tribe of Ephraim ( Jos 16:3); allotted to the Levites ( Jos 21:21); although the ancient inhabitants were not expelled ( Jos 16:10 Jud. 1:29 ). Laid waste by the Egyptians, but restored by Solomon ( -1 Ki. 9:1517 ).
